response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals, shipping discipline, and experience with large-scale systems, they fall significantly short on core requirements. The role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming; this resume shows approximately 1–2 years of C++ work (National Instruments 2014–2015, thesis project). Additionally, the candidate lacks documented technical leadership and mentoring experience despite holding senior titles, and their cloud infrastructure background is limited to AWS CDK usage rather than platform-level architecture design.
strengths: Proven large-scale systems experience at Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests per second with microservices and real-time data processing
Strong testing culture and code quality focus (TDD, CI/CD, craftsmanship) established across multiple organizations
Demonstrated ability to ship products and establish engineering practices (trunk-based development, pairing, best practices)
concerns: Critical C++ expertise gap: role requires 8 years, resume shows ~1–2 years total (2014–2015 at National Instruments, minimal since)
No documented technical leadership, mentoring, or team management experience despite holding Senior/Staff titles
Limited depth in cloud platform architecture and infrastructure design; AWS experience confined to CDK work rather than platform engineering

key_factors.factor: C++ experience shortfall (8yr required vs 1–2yr actual)
Absence of technical leadership and mentoring track record
